gold.title: Banner
gold.reason: Dismissible notification banner with gradient background, grid pattern overlay, icon, action button, and learn-more link — production-ready, real-world design (from Dub.co) with responsive layout.

gold.title: Upgrade Banner
gold.reason: Animated promotional banner with floating gear icons, hover effects, dark mode, close button, and upgrade CTA — polished, Vercel-inspired, perfect for SaaS upsell flows.

gold.title: Hero Badge
gold.reason: Feature-rich animated badge with multiple size/style variants, icon rotation on hover, link/button modes, Framer Motion animations, and full a11y — highly versatile announcement atom for hero sections.

silver.title: Hero Pill
silver.reason: Interactive announcement pill with fluid Framer Motion entrance, SSR-compatible, icon support and responsive design — strong hero accent, slightly overlaps with hero-badge.

silver.title: Hero Pill
silver.reason: Clean pill-shaped feature highlight with leading icon, smooth entrance animation, dark mode, and hover effects — polished utility component for hero sections.

silver.title: Announcement
silver.reason: Compound badge for announcements — minimal but clean; good for SaaS header banners.

silver.title: Banner
silver.reason: Straightforward banner component — functional for site-wide notifications, lacks the polish of dubinc variant.

bronze.title: Highlighter
bronze.reason: Highlighter/particle CTA combo — too decorative and niche; more of an effect than a standalone announcement component.

bronze.title: Animated Shiny Text
bronze.reason: Shimmer/glare text effect — visually interesting but is a text effect only, not a functional announcement block on its own.
